description_long: This is a detached residential garage structure with two prominent garage doors at the front, each featuring a rectangular window section. The garage is attached to a larger house, with a sloped roof and a driveway leading up to the doors. Two cars are parked on the driveway, emphasizing its function as a vehicle storage space. The exterior walls are light-colored, and the roof is a darker shade, likely made of asphalt shingles. The rear and side views show additional windows and a simple, clean architectural design typical of suburban neighborhoods.
description: A detached residential garage with two front-facing doors, attached to a house and accessed by a driveway with parked cars.
description_view_0: Front view showing two garage doors, driveway, and two parked cars.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped roof and the side wall of the garage, with part of the driveway and cars visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the garage and house, with several windows and no visible doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side wall of the garage and a partial view of the driveway and cars.
